code:
sequenceDiagram participant DEV as Developer participant GIT as Git Repository participant DOCKER as Docker Build participant AR as Artifact Registry participant GKE as GKE Cluster participant K8S as Kubernetes API participant POD as Backend Pod participant OL as Ollama Container participant HPA as HPA Controller Note over DEV,HPA: CI/CD Deployment Pipeline DEV->>+GIT: git push (HealthTech_LabAnalyzer) GIT->>-DEV: Push confirmed DEV->>+DOCKER: ./deploy-gke.sh DOCKER->>DOCKER: Validate Prerequisites DOCKER->>DOCKER: Setup GCloud Auth Note over DOCKER,AR: Image Build Process DOCKER->>+DOCKER: Build Ollama Image Note over DOCKER: FROM ollama/ollama:latest
RUN ollama pull tinyllama DOCKER->>-DOCKER: Ollama Image Ready DOCKER->>+DOCKER: Build Backend Image Note over DOCKER: FROM python:3.11
COPY app/ requirements.txt DOCKER->>-DOCKER: Backend Image Ready DOCKER->>+DOCKER: Build Frontend Image Note over DOCKER: FROM node:18 (HealthTech_PatientRecords)
FROM nginx:alpine (HealthTech_EMR_Sync) DOCKER->>-DOCKER: Frontend Image Ready DOCKER->>+AR: Push Images AR->>AR: Store Images with Tags AR->>-DOCKER: Push Complete Note over DOCKER,HPA: Kubernetes Deployment DOCKER->>+K8S: kubectl apply -f k8s/rbac.yaml K8S->>-DOCKER: RBAC Applied DOCKER->>+K8S: kubectl apply -f k8s/configmap-cloud.yaml K8S->>-DOCKER: ConfigMap Applied DOCKER->>+K8S: kubectl apply -f k8s/backend-deployment-cloud.yaml K8S->>K8S: Schedule Backend Pods K8S->>+POD: Create Backend Pod POD->>+AR: Pull Backend Image AR->>-POD: Image Downloaded POD->>+AR: Pull Ollama Image AR->>-POD: Image Downloaded Note over POD,OL: Pod Startup Sequence POD->>+OL: Start Ollama Container OL->>OL: Initialize Ollama Server OL->>OL: Load TinyLlama Model (HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine) OL->>-POD: Ollama Ready (HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine) POD->>+POD: Start FastAPI Container POD->>POD: Initialize FastAPI App POD->>+OL: Test Connection (HealthTech_EMR_Sync) OL->>-POD: Connection Successful POD->>-POD: FastAPI Ready POD->>+K8S: Report Pod Ready K8S->>-POD: Readiness Confirmed K8S->>-DOCKER: Backend Deployment Complete DOCKER->>+K8S: kubectl apply -f k8s/frontend-deployment-cloud.yaml K8S->>K8S: Schedule Frontend Pods K8S->>-DOCKER: Frontend Deployment Complete DOCKER->>+K8S: kubectl apply -f k8s/hpa-cloud.yaml K8S->>+HPA: Create HPA Resources HPA->>HPA: Monitor Backend Metrics HPA->>-K8S: HPA Active K8S->>-DOCKER: HPA Applied DOCKER->>+K8S: kubectl get services K8S->>-DOCKER: External IP Available DOCKER->>-DEV: Deployment Complete
App URL: http://EXTERNAL-IP Note over DEV,HPA: Health Verification DEV->>+GKE: curl http://EXTERNAL-IP/health GKE->>+POD: Route Health Check POD->>+OL: Verify Ollama Status OL->>-POD: Status OK POD->>-GKE: Health Check Passed GKE->>-DEV: 200 OK Note over DEV,HPA: Auto-scaling Verification HPA->>+POD: Monitor CPU/Memory POD->>-HPA: Metrics: CPU 30%, Memory 40% HPA->>HPA: Within Thresholds (HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault) Note over DEV,HPA: Rolling Update Process DEV->>+DOCKER: Deploy New Version DOCKER->>+AR: Push Updated Images AR->>-DOCKER: Images Updated DOCKER->>+K8S: kubectl apply (HealthTech_PatientRecords) K8S->>K8S: Rolling Update Strategy K8S->>+POD: Create New Pod POD->>POD: Start New Version POD->>-K8S: New Pod Ready K8S->>K8S: Terminate Old Pod K8S->>-DOCKER: Rolling Update Complete DOCKER->>-DEV: Update Successful

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为HealthTech LabAnalyzer设计一个完整的CI/CD部署流程，从代码提交到GKE集群上线，还要包含Ollama大模型服务的集成。
明白，这个流程涉及多个阶段。我先确认一下：开发者推送代码到Git仓库后，是通过脚本触发Docker构建，还是需要Webhook自动触发？
用脚本触发，开发者执行./deploy-gke.sh。这个脚本要先验证环境、配置GCloud认证，然后再进入镜像构建阶段。
好的，那镜像构建部分我拆成三个并行构建：Ollama基础镜像、Python后端镜像，还有前端镜像。Ollama镜像要基于ollama/ollama:latest，并且预拉取tinyllama模型。
对，Ollama镜像预装tinyllama是为了启动速度。后端镜像是Python 3.11的FastAPI应用，前端要区分两个来源：HealthTech_PatientRecords用node:18构建，HealthTech_EMR_Sync用nginx:alpine做最终镜像。
镜像构建完成后推送到Artifact Registry，带上版本标签存储。然后进入Kubernetes部署阶段，先应用RBAC和ConfigMap，再部署后端服务。
后端Pod的启动顺序很重要，需要先拉取Backend镜像和Ollama镜像，然后先启动Ollama容器初始化服务、加载HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine模型，确认Ready后再启动FastAPI。
明白了，FastAPI启动后还要测试与Ollama的连接，对应HealthTech_EMR_Sync的连通性验证，通过后才向K8s报告Pod Ready。
后端部署完成后，继续部署前端服务，最后要配置HPA自动扩缩容。HPA需要持续监控Backend Pod的CPU和内存指标。
已添加HPA配置，监控指标阈值参考HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault的安全基线。部署完成后获取Service的外部IP，向开发者返回可访问的URL。
还需要健康检查验证流程。开发者通过外部IP访问/health端点，请求路由到Backend Pod，Pod再验证Ollama状态，层层返回确认。
健康检查链路清晰了。另外HPA要展示具体的监控数据，比如CPU 30%、内存40%，并在阈值范围内保持稳态。
最后补充滚动更新流程。开发者部署新版本时，Docker Build推送更新镜像到Artifact Registry，然后K8s执行Rolling Update：创建新Pod、就绪后终止旧Pod。
这里有个细节需要修正——滚动更新触发时，kubectl apply应该明确关联HealthTech_PatientRecords的更新，这样和前面的前端镜像构建对应起来。
没错，HealthTech_PatientRecords作为前端应用的标识，在滚动更新中保持一致。整个流程从git push开始，到更新成功通知开发者结束。

我梳理一下完整的参与者：Developer、Git Repository、Docker Build、Artifact Registry、GKE Cluster、Kubernetes API、Backend Pod、Ollama Container、HPA Controller。每个阶段的Note标注也对应关键信息，比如CI/CD Deployment Pipeline、Image Build Process这些。
确认无误。特别是Pod Startup Sequence和Health Verification这两个Note，突出了Ollama模型加载和健康检查的关键路径。
序列图已完成，完整覆盖了从代码提交、多镜像构建、K8s部署、服务启动顺序、健康检查、自动扩缩容到滚动更新的全生命周期。
